hero.question: Will Arizona win the 2026 NCAA Tournament?
hero.prob_take:
Arizona at 33.8% is pricing them as a top-4 tournament contender, which tracks if their frontcourt stays healthy and Caleb Love keeps playing point guard like he has real money on it.

The sharp move here is that this line assumes zero variance in a college basketball season, but Arizona's schedule in January and February will tell us whether they're a 1-seed ceiling or a 5-seed floor, and the market won't fully reprrice until March madness approaches.

daily_take.headline: Arizona's Tournament Price Just Jumped. Smart Money Disagrees.
daily_take.deck: Arizona just popped 2.2 points to 33.8% after getting healthy and locking in tournament seeding. But the market is confusing a good defensive roster with a title contender. This team still lacks the elite ball movement and perimeter shot-making that wins in March. Sharp bettors should fade the momentum and look to sell at resistance.
